---
name: readme-maintenance
description: "Keep README.md and related project-context docs aligned when important project changes land."
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# README Maintenance

When a change affects routes, catalog data flow, page structure, scripts, or workflow docs, update [README.md](../../README.md) in the same change set. If the change also affects planning or workflow references, keep the relevant project-context docs aligned as well.
